Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Stormwing]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — Stormwings are a breed of Kameira that hunt using thunderlights and can escape by diving beneath waves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — The Stormwing is a ship that has a fractured deck with a hole in it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Stormwing has a lingering aroma.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Stormwings can create bright explosions by snapping their tails over waves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — The Stormwing is something the ship needs to catch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — The Stormwing is a creature that the Lyathatan was asked to fight.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — A Stormwing's stinger can be used for defense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — The Stormwing has an Awakened tail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Stormwing provides concussive power.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
